user.title: Zodiac iAquaLink Heat Pump
user.description:
Sign in with your iAquaLink account and enter the heat pump serial number.

To find the serial: log in at the [iAquaLink website]({iaqualink_url}), open the location for your pool, then click **Device Status**. It is also printed on the sticker on the unit and looks like `{serial_example}`.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Zodiac iAquaLink
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {email} are no longer accepted by the iAquaLink cloud. Enter the current password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the iAquaLink cloud.

abort.already_configured: This heat pump is already configured.
